name:
I'm outside the airlock on a ledge.
The ground is 90 meters below
description:
I'm outside the airlock on a ledge.
The ground is 90 meters below
hints: You're on a ledge outside the airlock, 90 meters up!
Don't panic about the height - the gravity is very weak.
JUMP is safe because of the low gravity on this planetoid.
JUMP to safely float down, or GO SHIP to re-enter the airlock.

effects: Message: The gravity here is very

notes: Ledge outside the ship's airlock. Low gravity makes jumping safe. Wear space suit before exiting.
